Changelog

Every shipped change.

Every release of One Link, every push to this site, in reverse chronological order. The git history is the source of truth; this page is the human-readable view of it.

2026-05-25

site SmartScreen + Gatekeeper friction softened end-to-end

  • New heads-up panel above the download button on /download/: sets expectations before the click. Four tiles cover the two click-through paths (Windows "More info" then "Run anyway"; macOS right-click + Open or System Settings + Open Anyway with the exact localized dialog strings per language), the in-browser verify path, and the build-from-source alternative.
  • New page at /verify-download/: drop a downloaded binary into the page, the browser computes its SHA-256 locally via Web Crypto (the file never leaves your tab), then fetches the live signed value via HEAD /download/<os> and renders a green match / red mismatch result with the attestation-chain link on success.
  • Worker now publishes X-Artifact-SHA256 on every R2-served download path (Windows, Linux, macOS, source, generic) with Access-Control-Expose-Headers so the verify page can read it. New attachArtifactHash() helper tries R2 auto-checksums first, falls back to customMetadata.sha256.
  • Translated into all 5 shipped languages with native Windows + macOS dialog labels (es "Más información" / "Ejecutar de todas formas", fr "Informations complémentaires" / "Exécuter quand même", de "Weitere Informationen" / "Trotzdem ausführen", pt "Mais informações" / "Executar mesmo assim", it "Ulteriori informazioni" / "Esegui comunque"). 100 translated pages footer-swept to add the Verify-download link.
  • Until the EV Authenticode + Apple Developer ID notarization land (tracked on /roadmap/), every new user has a 10-second click-through path with full bytes-in-tab verification. The warning becomes a footnote, not a wall.
2026-05-24

site /roadmap/ shipped + daemon ROADMAP.md expanded

  • New public page at /roadmap/: what we are building next, in plain language, no version numbers. Six tracks (Reach, Always works, Just works, Owned by no one, External eyes, Will not build) cover every ship currently in flight or planned, plus an explicit "not in scope" list. Translated into all 5 shipped languages on the same push.
  • Daemon ROADMAP.md (One_link/docs/ROADMAP.md) expanded with 6 named ships covering every gap identified in the "would I personally use this for everything" audit: v1.0.0 PWA share-to-stranger acceptance gate, threshold-recovery user flow ("guardians"), group voice + video + 50-100-person groups via new ol_sfu crate, daemon corruption self-healing via new ol_resync crate, F9 relay-operator onramp (Docker + Pi + cloud-init + public directory), plus a new External Assurance track (first external pentest + funded bug bounty + independent reproducible-build verification). Plus a Scope Decisions section with 8 explicit "not in scope" entries. 478 to 835 lines.
  • Footer "For you" column now carries the Roadmap link site-wide; 20 English pages + 95 translated pages swept idempotently.
  • build-i18n.py TRACKED_PAGES extended with roadmap/index.html; worker CONTENT_SLUGS gains roadmap so the trailing-slash 301 fires on every language path.
2026-05-23

site v0.21.0-alpha.0+r89 - tighten + i18n + claim parity

  • Daemon claim parity sweep: corrected ol_ratchet description (per-chunk KDF chain, not Double Ratchet), ol_pair_qr ML-KEM mix-in re-classed as v0.22-pending, ol_homology fuzz-gate scale, /api/status referenced (was /api/capabilities, never existed), crate count 37 to 41, per-chunk forward secrecy reclassified as live today between capable peers.
  • Transparency page expanded with full Cloudflare sub-processor disclosure: MeshPresence + NativeSession + ShareRate Durable Objects + RELEASES R2 bucket.
  • Full 17 inner pages translated into es, fr, de, pt, it (85 pages). Footer language switcher chain auto-injected on every translated page.
  • 404 page in 5 languages with language-aware worker routing: requests under /es/, /fr/, /de/, /pt/, /it/ that miss now serve the matching localized 404.
  • Open Graph share cards: per-language SVG + PNG (1200x630) at /og/one-link-<code>.png. og:image + twitter:image swept across 75 translated pages. Generator: scripts/build-og-per-language.py (resvg-py renderer).
  • Worker downloadComingSoonPage now ships in the visitor's language via Accept-Language detection; 8 OS blocks x 6 languages = 48 localized cells.
  • Signed manifest now covers all 110 HTML files (was 4); rehash-manifest.py auto-discovers new pages. Build-i18n.py made CRLF-tolerant + switcher-injecting for fresh pages.
  • CSP compliance: zero inline style="..." attrs across HTML+JS in dist/. style-src 'self' now enforceable. New utility classes .ol-soft-prose, .ol-soft-note, .ol-dim-mono.
2026-05-18 .. 2026-05-22

daemon - device-identity surface, phone bootstrap, cert auto-reconnect

  • Device-identity sidebar: paired iPhone surfaces in the desktop "Your One identity" section; laptop appears with smart labels; per-device prune.
  • Phone bootstrap (Phase 2-4): chunked file upload from phone via daemon DataChannel; mobile-first CSS (full-bleed, sticky composer, iOS no-zoom); Settings card (identity + paired daemon + sign out); per-peer alias rename + mute toggle on phone.
  • Cert-authed phone auto-reconnect after daemon restart or tab close; cert-relogin wins over stale setup_device_invite query; 30-min device-invite TTL; single-pane navigation.
  • Pair flow polish: SAS confirm now propagated phone-side via /status poll; sha256-tagged wire fingerprint emitted to peer.html; cache-bust peer.html and try-roster on pair-complete; unguarded /device-invite/claim for phone bootstrap.
  • UI/UX: bullet-proof cache busting via ETag on index.html; [hidden] CSS contract enforced; Settings advanced controls wired; stable nav icons; harden chat shell copy; restored composer icon buttons.
  • Phone file RECEIVE: inline file bubble + chunked download (16 KiB chunks + backpressure + auto-reconnect on DC close).
  • User-facing ROADMAP.md added at One_link/docs/ - what "done" looks like, plain English.
2026-05-18

site v0.21.0-alpha.0+r48 - audit closeout

  • WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility pass: real focus rings on every interactive element; mobile-nav swapped from label-for-checkbox to real button aria-expanded; footer heading hierarchy fixed h4 to h3; 44 by 44 touch-target floor; contrast on dimmed text lifted to 4.5:1; forced-colors + prefers-contrast media queries.
  • Mobile + responsive: 100svh for iOS Safari URL-bar; env(safe-area-inset) for notch + landscape; tablet breakpoint 761-1024px; comparison-table overflow-scroll with edge shadow under 720px; WebGPU shader gated on desktop + non-saveData.
  • Performance: HTML cache-control gains s-maxage=300 + stale-while-revalidate=86400; modulepreload for bridge.js site-wide; document.hidden short-circuit in both render loops.
  • SEO + canonical URLs in worker: 301 lowercase canonical (/Features/ to /features/); 301 trailing-slash for content dirs (was 307 from assets); 301 /favicon.ico to /images/favicon.ico; HEAD on /download/source honored; dual theme-color (light + dark media); Twitter Card title/desc/image on all OG pages; designed /404.html wired via not_found_handling.
  • Trust pages added: /accessibility/, /transparency/ (warrant canary + government-request log), /changelog/.
  • .well-known/security.txt (RFC 9116) with disclosure policy and SLA.
  • Privacy: dropped Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * from HTML responses; deleted dist/_headers (worker is source of truth, removed the X-No-Tracking deception header it carried).
  • www -> apex 301 redirect at the worker layer (closes duplicate-200 problem; NEL/Report-To stripped on the redirect itself).
2026-05-16 .. 2026-05-17

site v0.21.0-alpha.0+r34 .. r47 - public preview

  • Positive-forward framing sweep across all pages: zero "what we do not do" / "five companies" / "what we cannot fix" copy.
  • Real ed25519-signed release attestations for Windows + Linux + source archive.
  • Live MeshPresence Durable Object: real "N here right now" pill (replaces hardcoded counter).
  • OS detection on home hero CTA + /download/ page CTAs.
  • Service Worker with verify-against-signed-manifest before serve; cached integrity mismatch evicts + refetches.
  • Repos migrated to IamOneYouAreOneWeAreOne organization with personal identifiers fully stripped.
2026-05-14

daemon ol_onion Sphinx T1.5 - Schnorr batch aggregation

  • Ristretto255 sign + verify with Pippenger MSM batch_verify; 2.6x speedup at N=64 over sequential verification.
  • 271 ol_onion tests, including 9 proptests at 1M iterations, 12 adversarial vectors, 7 KAT vectors.
  • Closes the last deferred Sphinx Tier-1 item.
2026-05-13

daemon Row 10 confidential-compute, Phase 1

  • ol_confidential crate: ConfidentialProvider trait + SoftwareProvider (ChaCha20-Poly1305 sealing + Zeroize).
  • AttestationDoc: post-quantum-hybrid + peer-nonce + 30s freshness + field-witness binding.
  • TLA+ spec, 46 tests / 0 failed, lib clippy -D warnings clean.
  • Coherence Mesh: 10 of 10 rows now shipped (Phase 1 of Row 10).
2026-05-11

daemon Phase E - coherence-field substrate

  • ol_coherence_field crate: ports the S_One stack (reaction-diffusion to Helmholtz to Green-function to BE-RAR to apparent-horizon anchor).
  • Three couplings: homology to field, field to prefetch, field to ratchet.
  • pyo3 daemon surface live; 12/13 plan gates flipped to Met with numerical evidence.
  • Bench: 10k peers in 1.74ms on a single CPU core.
Earlier history

Every commit since v0.1.0.

The full history is in the public git repository, signed and dated:

One Link

A free, private network for messages, files, and devices. Owned by no one. Belongs to everyone.
